/CAL:SENTENCING/CTW:321/X: CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IS WAIVED FOR BHC PURPOSES ONLY,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y/4019HALF/PJ:1 YEAR/X:ONE YEAR COUNTY JAIL CAN BE SATISFIED TRHU GGRC OR PLACEMENT IN PROGRAM SUCCESSFULLY/X:DEFENDANTSHALL SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE BEHAVIOR HEALTH COURT/WS/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NOALCOHOL/DTC/RESTV/PPRFCOMP/WEAP/SAORD/SA1:150 YARDS FROM ANNIE MARIE YANTES/SA2:DRUMM STREET BETWEEN CALIFORNIA AND CLAY STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS, AND NOT VIOLATE THE STAY AWAY ORDER/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM ANDLEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OFPROBATION AND REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW TREATMENT PLACEMENT,/X:IF DEFENDANT LEAVES BHC OR IS TERMINATED FROM BHC, THE PEOPLE WOULD REQUEST REVOCATION OF PROBATION,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/X:IF THE DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM, AND AT LEAST 3 YEARS OF SUCCESSFUL PARTICIPATIN WITH APD,  CHARGES MAY BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITH PROPER FILING OF MOTION,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA:40/ICNA/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD:FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINES AND FEES/PROB ADM REV/CONTD:BEHAVIOR COURT/DOP/

/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 2 (245(A)4PC, A FELONY) IS GRANTED/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADVRTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-28-19/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 5 Y; DTC; WS; RX AND NO ALCOHOL WHILE WORKING WITH BHCAND PROBATION; VF $300/X:DNACOMP; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA; FINE/X:VICTIM RESTITUTION AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION/X:ADHERENCE TO THE APD AND BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE, BASED UPON THE FACTS OF THIS CASE AND DEF'S HISTORY, ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSED PHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BHC, PROBATION, AS WELL AS MENTAL HEALTH AND OR DRUG TREATMENT/X:SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF BHC/X:STAY AWAY ORDER TO BE FILED AT SENTENCE/X:POSSESS NO KNIVES OR OTHER WEAPONS,/X:NO NEW ARRESTS OR SAO VIOLATIONS/X:WAIVER OF CUSTODY CREDITS 321 DAYS FOR PURPOSES OF BHC ONLY/X:IFDEF, IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGES OF SAO VIOLATIONS, DEF WILL BE IN VIOLATIONOF PROBATION AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT ORTREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, DEF WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT ANEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF, FAILS TO ADHERE TO BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN, DEF WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEWPLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT THE AGREEMENT OF THE ENTIRE BHC TEAM/X:17(B)MAY BE CONSIDERED UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF BHC AS AGREED UPONBY THE ENTIRE BHC TEAM, AND AT LEASE 3 YEARS OF APD SUCCESSFULY PARTICIPATION/
